description.unified: Upon killing an enemy, reduces the Cooldown of all skills by 30% and gains 1 stacks of [Harvest]. [Harvest]: Increases ATK by 80*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), stacking up to 10 times.

light.unified: Increases Mana recovery per second by [10%->{1}%] per stack.

description.unified: On hit, has a 25% chance to deal additional Magic DMG equal to {0}% of ATK and increase your Attack by {1}%. The Attack increase stacks up to 5 times.
